name: @tootallnate/lgp
description: Pure-JS parser for the LGP archive format used by Final Fantasy VII / VIII on PC (the "SQUARESOFT" container ending with the magic "FINAL FANTASY7"). Reads the table of contents + per-file headers from a Blob; produces a lazy list of entries whose `.data` is a Blob slice ready for re-streaming. No directory rebuild — paths from the optional path table are flattened into each entry.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
